description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a low-pitched, expansive hip roof and a prominent attached garage on one side. The facade is adorned with multiple rectangular windows, each framed with light-colored shutters, and a central entryway flanked by greenery. The driveway is wide and leads directly to the garage, bordered by a row of palm trees and a manicured lawn. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the natural wood tones of the roof and shutters. The landscaping includes a mix of grass, shrubs, and decorative plants, enhancing the suburban appeal. The overall design is simple yet elegant, with a focus on symmetry and functional outdoor space.
description: A single-story bungalow with a hip roof, attached garage, symmetrical windows, and landscaped front yard with palm trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, attached garage, driveway, and a row of palm trees along the front lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the hip roof, the garage extension, and a continuous grassy area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows, expansive lawn, and the bungalow's elongated structure.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the driveway, garage door, side garden, and palm trees along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
